content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: Apex Logistics Co.
Customer ID: C002
Contract ID: K002
Account Executive: James Okafor
Deal Type: New Business
Date: January 15, 2023

DEAL SUMMARY
Closed Apex Logistics Co. on DataSync Pro Starter at 10 users, $6,000 ARR. No discount. Relatively fast sales cycle of three weeks from first demo to signed contract.

DISCOVERY NOTES
Primary contact is VP of Operations, Brian Calloway. Apex was struggling with version control on their shipment documentation — multiple teams were working off different versions of the same files. DataSync Pro's real-time sync and audit trail features directly addressed this pain point.

CLOSING NOTES
No significant objections during the sales process. Brian Calloway had budget authority and moved quickly. The Starter tier was appropriate for their initial use case though the account has clear expansion potential as they onboard more regional logistics coordinators.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
Apex has 6 regional offices. Currently only the central operations team is licensed. Flag for expansion in Q3 2023 once initial adoption is confirmed.
